title: RE:Vanilla
body:
[![Chat with me on Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/wjCEHS6EYD)
[![Available for Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d09af3c5104f9344153c9d7dbff5aa9ff88d28.png)](https://leavesmc.org/software/leaves)

RE:Vanilla is a modpack that maximizes the vanilla experience and is compatible with any of your favorite servers.

Let's compare:
||**RE:Vanilla(You are here!)**|A Popular Modpack|绿色版红石生电优化|Vanilla|
|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
|FPS|**530**|455|190|97|
|OptiFine Support|Partial|Yes|No|No|
|Easy to get started|**Yes**|Yes|No||
|UtilTools|No|No|Yes|No|
|Fairness|**Yes**|Partial|No||

_CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-8750H_

_RAM: 4GB / 32GB_

_GPU: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050Ti_

# 简体中文

[在 QQ 上与我交流（377030853）](https://qm.qq.com/cgi-bin/qm/qr?group_code=377030853)

RE:Vanilla 是一款能最大限度提升原版体验的整合包，且兼容您喜爱的任何服务器。

让我们对比一下：
||**RE:Vanilla（你在这里！）**|某热门整合包|绿色版红石生电优化|原版|
|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|
|帧数|**530**|455|190|97|
|OptiFine 支持|部分|是|否|否|
|易于上手|**是**|是|否||
|实用工具|否|否|是|否|
|公平性|**是**|部分|否||

_处理器：英特尔® 酷睿™ i7-8750H_

_随机访问存储器：4GB / 32GB_

_显示卡：NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050Ti_
